items.label: Overview
items.content:
# Games Module
Curated dataset of 533 games.

## What it does
- Loads remote game data
- Normalizes entries
- Supports filtering without mutating source

## Game structure
- name, alias
- category (optional)
- devices
- thumbnail
- url key

items.label: Search & Filter
items.content:
# search(query)

```js
ZYNQ.games.search(query)
```

## What it does
Filters games by name or alias.

## Input
```ts
query?: string
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

## Behavior
- case-insensitive
- updates `filtered`
- does not touch `all`
- returns `this` (chainable)

## Empty query
Returns full dataset (533 games)

items.label: Device Support
items.content:
# Device support

## Types
- 1 mobile
- 2 desktop
- 3 phone
- 4 tablet

## Detection
Runs once at init using:
- user agent
- touch support
- GPU hints

## Usage
```js
game.isSupported
```

## Behavior
Checks if current device matches game.device list.
Returns boolean (computed getter).

items.label: API
items.content:
# Games API

## Properties

```js
ZYNQ.games.list           // filtered array
ZYNQ.games.total          // 533
ZYNQ.games.filteredCount  // current size
```

## Methods

### search
```js
ZYNQ.games.search(query)
// filters games
// returns this
```

### reset
```js
ZYNQ.games.reset()
// restores full list
// returns this
```

### sortBy
```js
ZYNQ.games.sortBy(field)
// sorts filtered list
// returns this
```

### sortByPopularity
```js
ZYNQ.games.sortByPopularity()
// sorts by playCount
// returns this
```

### getByAlias
```js
ZYNQ.games.getByAlias(alias)
// returns Game | null
```

### getByCategory
```js
ZYNQ.games.getByCategory(category)
// filters by category
// returns this
```

### filterSupported
```js
ZYNQ.games.filterSupported()
// keeps supported games only
// returns this
```

### toggleFavorite
```js
ZYNQ.games.toggleFavorite(alias)
// adds/removes favorite
// updates storage
// returns this
```

## Chaining
```js
ZYNQ.games.search("car").filterSupported().sortBy("name")
```

items.label: Overview
items.content:
# Peer System
Wrapper around PeerJS.

## What it does
- peer connections
- auto reconnect
- rate limited messaging
- media + data support

## State
```txt
DISCONNECTED → CONNECTING → CONNECTED → RECONNECTING → FAILED
```

items.label: Connection
items.content:
# connect(remoteId)

```js
peer.connect(remoteId)
```

## Input
```ts
remoteId: string
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQPeer
```

## What it does
- opens data channel
- starts media call (if enabled)
- syncs peer state

## Notes
- self connect ignored
- reconnect safe
- replaces active session

items.label: Data & Media
items.content:
# send(data)

```js
peer.send(data)
```

## Input
```ts
string | object
```

## Behavior
- sends to peer
- emits "sent"

## getStream()
```js
peer.getStream()
```

## Returns
```ts
MediaStream | null
```

## Behavior
- requests camera/mic
- cached after first call
- emits "localStream"

## Incoming media
- emits "stream"

items.label: Events
items.content:
# Events

## on(event)
```js
peer.on(event, handler)
```

## emit(event)
Internal, rate limited (500ms dedupe)

## Core events
```txt
ready
open
data
stream
close
error
reconnecting
```

## Errors
```txt
peer
data
media
reconnect_failed
```

## Example
```js
peer.on("data", msg => console.log(msg))
```
